docketList.title: Teja Hospitals Cover Photo
docketList.descr: Design a cover photo for teja hospitals

docketList.title: Dark Theme HTTP Error Code Image Design
docketList.descr: Desig and generate dark theme versions of HTTP error code images to ensure they are visually clear, consistent, and optimized for use in dark mode interfaces.

docketList.title: Cover Design
docketList.descr: Design a cover for sayukt hard bound

docketList.title: SVG Asset Conversion & Path Verification
docketList.descr: Work on converting PNG image assets into SVG format and verifying the SVG path data to ensure compatibility, scalability, and proper rendering within the application.

docketList.title: HTTP Error Code  Visual Asset Design
docketList.descr: Work on creating visual assets for HTTP error codes by designing clear, consistent, and user-friendly error illustrations for application use.

docketList.title: Ecolly Final Video  Revision & Feedback Implementation
docketList.descr: Worked on revising the Ecolly final video by incorporating the changes and feedback provided to improve the overall quality and presentation.

docketList.title: Ecolly Expo  Day 3 Video Editing
docketList.descr: Work on editing the Day 3 Ecolly Expo video by refining the event footage, ensuring a smooth sequence, and maintaining accurate synchronization between video and audio.

docketList.title: Teja Hospital Brochure Recreation
docketList.descr: Recreat of Teja Hospital brochure by accurately replicating the original design layout, incorporating all text, logos, and visual elements while maintaining consistency with the existing branding.

docketList.title: Expo Event Footage  Collection & Organization
docketList.descr: Work on collecting and organizing the expo event footage from multiple mobile devices to prepare a structured workflow for the video editing process.

docketList.title: Buckdesk Video Major Enhancements
docketList.descr: Work on re-editing the Buckdesk video by implementing major changes to improve the overall flow, presentation, and visual quality of the content.

docketList.title: Harika Auto Center  Generator Invoice Design
docketList.descr: Worke on designing a professional generator invoice for Harika Auto Center, focusing on creating a clear, organized, and visually appealing document layout for billing and service records.

docketList.title: Tech Tempo  Poster Design Enhancement
docketList.descr: Work on designing a promotional poster for the Tech Tempo session, focusing on creating an engaging and visually appealing design that effectively represents the technology theme.

docketList.title: Buckdesk Event Highlights  Video Editing & Production
docketList.descr: Work on creating a polished video presentation for Buckdesk by editing and enhancing footage captured during the expo event. Need to trim and merge the the clips and also need to add background music with perfect audio sync

docketList.title: Buck Desk Video Editing
docketList.descr: Work on editing videos content for Buckdesk captured during the expo events, focusing on creating a clear, engaging, and professionally structured presentation.

docketList.title: Ecolly Video Editing
docketList.descr: Work on producing and editing the Ecolly expo event video by organizing event footage and enhancing the visual storytelling of the presentation. Need to edit the video clips with better background music and also with vocals

docketList.title: Ecolly Video Editing
docketList.descr: Works on editing video content for Ecolly captured during the expo event, focusing on creating a visually engaging and well-structured presentation.

docketList.title: Brochure and Flex Design Update
docketList.descr: Go through previous expo brochures and flex designs for reference, update the Buck Desk brochure with the required changes, and start designing the new flex layout.

docketList.title: Sindhoor Enterprises Invoice Design
docketList.descr: Create and finalize the invoice format for Sindhoor Enterprises and prepare it for printing after review.

docketList.title: Survey Documentation Landing Page UI Update
docketList.descr: Update the Survey Documentation landing page UI for both desktop and mobile devices and ensure proper functionality across platforms.

docketList.title: Panchayat Seva App  Android Auto Icon Optimization
docketList.descr: Design of icons for the Panchayat Seva App Android Auto Car interface, ensuring clear visibility and a consistent appearance in both normal mode and night mode environments.

docketList.title: Innlly Invoice Design & Business Document Research
docketList.descr: Work on designing an invoice for Innlly and conducted research on essential business documents, including order forms, purchase orders, and payment receipts, to understand their structure and required information.

docketList.title: Innlly Works
docketList.descr: Working on developing the visual identity and business assets for Innlly, including UI designs, logo concepts, letterheads, invoices, and other branding materials to establish a consistent and professional brand presence.

docketList.title: Android Auto Interface  Icon Design
docketList.descr: Designed custom icons for the Android Auto interface, focusing on simplicity, visibility, and consistency to ensure a clear user experience within automotive displays.

docketList.title: Panchayat Seva App Android Auto Car Play Design
docketList.descr: Working on designing and adapting icons for the Panchayat Seva App to ensure compatibility with Android Auto while maintaining visual clarity and consistency with the applications design language.

docketList.title: Elitical Logo  Animation Design
docketList.descr: Work on animating the Elitical logo by creating multiple animation styles to explore different visual effects and identify the most suitable brand presentation.
